char_overview: 林野, a former latent 灵能者, underwent sudden physical metamorphosis during an emotional breakdown at his workplace. His body fused with office furniture, transforming into a 5-meter-tall half-humanoid entity. This is the first recorded case of a 灵能者 transforming into a malevolent spirit, designated as 扭曲 by the 狩灵协会.
char_abilities: 扭曲同化: Passively fuses with and assimilates surrounding objects, integrating them into its body mass. The larger it grows, the greater its crushing force becomes. Objects containing 灵力 are drawn toward its body and absorbed as fuel, accelerating its expansion.
char_mission: Madly attacks everything around it and absorbs all objects containing 灵力 to fuel itself.
